summary: Complete frontend testing of /blog/refrigerator-not-cooling article page redesign with Precision Craft design system. 22/23 features passing. Minor issue: SEO title says '5 Common Reasons' instead of '5 Reasons' per spec.

issues: Title is '5 Common Reasons Your Refrigerator Isn't Cooling | FixitBay' - spec mentioned '5 Reasons' but current title is more descriptive and SEO-friendly

context_for_next_testing_agent: Article page /blog/refrigerator-not-cooling fully tested with Precision Craft design system. All major features working: (1) Hero with breadcrumb Home → Blog → Refrigerator, category pill 'Refrigerator', date 'January 20, 2025', '5 min read', H1 '5 Common Reasons Your Refrigerator Isn't Cooling — Bay Area Repair Guide'. (2) 2-column layout 68%/32% (748px/352px). (3) TOC with 7 anchor links (#dirty-coils, #thermostat, #door-seals, #air-vents, #compressor, #checklist, #when-to-call). (4) Safety Notice with orange border-left. (5) 5 article sections with numbered H2s. (6) Prevention Tip boxes with dark navy background and checkmark. (7) Mid-article CTA after section 3 with orange #FF5722 background, Call and Book buttons. (8) Quick Diagnostic Checklist with 5 items and circle checkmarks. (9) FAQ section with 5 questions in accordion, chevron rotates on expand/collapse. (10) When to Call section with 5 items and orange dash prefix. (11) Bottom CTA with navy background, PROFESSIONAL HELP eyebrow, Call and Book buttons. (12) Author box with avatar A, Andrei - Licensed Appliance Technician, License #51001. (13) Sticky sidebar at top:80px with 3 widgets: Book Repair (Call and Book buttons), Related Articles (4 links), Service Links (5 pill links). (14) Related Services section with 3 cards (2 SERVICE + 1 ARTICLE). (15) Minimal footer with logo, phone, copyright 2026. (16) Floating BOOK REPAIR button on desktop after 300px scroll. (17) Mobile sticky bar with CALL, BOOK ONLINE, TEXT US buttons. (18) SEO: title contains '5 Common Reasons', meta description present, canonical URL https://fixitbay.net/blog/refrigerator-not-cooling, Article/FAQPage/BreadcrumbList JSON-LD schemas. (19) No console errors. Uses custom SEOMetaTags + useSchemas hook (NOT react-helmet-async). Mobile responsive with single-column layout and 26px H1 font.
